result:
**Goal: Add a "Snowfall & Blizzard" simulation mode.**

This would simulate realistic snowflakes falling with wind dynamics, accumulation on surfaces, drifting, and blizzard intensity controls. Snowflakes of varying sizes interact with wind gusts, pile up on the ground forming drifts, and the user can adjust wind speed/direction, snowfall density, and temperature (affecting flake size and behavior). The "Audio & Visual" category currently has only 1 mode — this would be a visually striking addition that fits naturally alongside the existing weather/atmosphere simulations while being distinct from the Atmospheric Weather mode (which models pressure systems, not individual particle snowfall).

Want me to build it?
